forms.fieldExplanation.binds.description.defaultMessage: Maps host directories to container directories for persistent storage or sharing. Format: /host/path:/container/path[:ro|rw]

forms.fieldExplanation.capAdd.descriptio.defaultMessage: Add Linux kernel capabilities to the container, e.g., 'NET_ADMIN' for network management.

forms.fieldExplanation.capDrop.descripti.defaultMessage: Remove default Linux kernel capabilities to improve container security.

forms.fieldExplanation.cpuPeriod.descrip.defaultMessage: Duration of a CPU scheduling period. Used with CPU Quota to limit CPU usage.

forms.fieldExplanation.cpuQuota.descript.defaultMessage: CPU time allowed per period. Example: quota 50000 with period 100000 → 50% of one CPU.

forms.fieldExplanation.cpuRealtimePeriod.defaultMessage: Scheduling period for CPU time dedicated to real-time tasks. Set to 0 to allocate no time allocated to real-time tasks.

forms.fieldExplanation.cpuRealtimeRuntim.defaultMessage: Max real-time CPU time within the real-time period. Cannot exceed the real-time period.

forms.fieldExplanation.deviceMappings.de.defaultMessage: Maps host devices to container paths with specific access permissions.

forms.fieldExplanation.env.description.defaultMessage: JSON array of environment variables in 'KEY=VALUE' format, used to pass config to the containerized app.

forms.fieldExplanation.extraHosts.descri.defaultMessage: List of hostname/IP mappings added to the container's /etc/hosts for custom DNS resolution. 'host-gateway' resolves to the host IP.

forms.fieldExplanation.hostname.descript.defaultMessage: The network hostname to assign to the container, which must comply with RFC 1123.

forms.fieldExplanation.imageCredentials..defaultMessage: Select credentials needed to pull this image from a private registry. Leave empty for public images.

forms.fieldExplanation.imageReference.de.defaultMessage: The complete reference for the container image you want to use, including registry, repository, and tag.

forms.fieldExplanation.memory.descriptio.defaultMessage: Maximum physical memory the container can use. Set 0 for unlimited memory.

forms.fieldExplanation.memoryReservation.defaultMessage: Allows you to specify a soft limit smaller than Memory which is activated when Docker detects contention or low memory on the host machine. If you use Memory Reservation, it must be set lower than Memory for it to take precedence. Because it is a soft limit, it doesn't guarantee that the container doesn't exceed the limit.

forms.fieldExplanation.memorySwap.descri.defaultMessage: The total amount of memory plus swap the container can use. If memorySwap is set to a positive value, both Memory and Memory Swap must be set. Memory controls the amount of physical memory, and Memory Swap represents the combined limit of memory and swap. For example, if memory='300m' and memorySwap='1g', the container can use 300MB of memory and 700MB of swap (1GB - 300MB).

forms.fieldExplanation.memorySwappiness..defaultMessage: Controls kernel swap behavior. 0 = avoid swapping, 100 = swap aggressively.

forms.fieldExplanation.networkMode.descr.defaultMessage: Supported standard values are: bridge, host, none, and container:'<name|id>'. Any other value is treated as the name of a user-defined network. Other container engines may support additional modes.

forms.fieldExplanation.networks.descript.defaultMessage: Select custom networks the container should connect to, usually for inter-service communication.

forms.fieldExplanation.portBindings.desc.defaultMessage: Maps host ports to container ports for external access. Format: [host_port:]container_port[/protocol]. Protocol defaults to TCP.

forms.fieldExplanation.privileged.descri.defaultMessage: Run container with extended privileges, giving full host resource access (like root).

forms.fieldExplanation.readOnlyRootfs.de.defaultMessage: Prevents modification of system files by making the container's root filesystem read-only.

forms.fieldExplanation.restartPolicy.des.defaultMessage: Defines container restart behavior. Options: 'no' (never restart), 'always', 'unless-stopped', 'on-failure'.

forms.fieldExplanation.storageOpt.descri.defaultMessage: Driver-specific storage options, such as limiting the size of the writable layer.

forms.fieldExplanation.tmpfs.description.defaultMessage: In-memory filesystems mounted at specified container paths. Data is fast but lost on container restart.

forms.fieldExplanation.volumeDriver.desc.defaultMessage: Driver/plugin used to manage and mount volumes.

forms.fieldExplanation.volumes.descripti.defaultMessage: Attach an existing volume to a path inside the container. This allows the container to persist data or share it with other containers. You only need to select the volume and provide the container path where it will be mounted.

forms.validation.baseImageStartingVersio.defaultMessage: The supported starting versions must be a valid version range

forms.validation.baseImageVersion.format.defaultMessage: The version must follow the Semantic Versioning spec

forms.validation.cpuQuotaPeriod.format.defaultMessage: CPU Period and CPU Quota must be either both set or both unset

forms.validation.extraHosts.format.defaultMessage: Invalid extra host format. Use 'hostname:IP' or 'hostname:host-gateway'.

forms.validation.handle.format.defaultMessage: The handle must start with a letter and only contain lower case characters, numbers or the hyphen symbol -

forms.validation.invalidJson.defaultMessage: Must be a valid JSON string.

forms.validation.json.expectedObject.defaultMessage: Expected an object with key-value pairs

forms.validation.memoryReservationInvali.defaultMessage: Memory Reservation must be set lower than Memory in order to take precedence.

forms.validation.memorySwapInvalid.defaultMessage: Memory Swap must be greater than/equal to Memory.

forms.validation.number.max.defaultMessage: Must be less than or equal to {max}.

forms.validation.number.min.defaultMessage: Must be greater than or equal to {min}.
